languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

languages.text: "Страдания стоит лишь по-настоящему продуманная стратегия захвата. Те, кто попал сюда, совершили ошибку и понесли наказание".
"Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."
languages.original_text: "Страдания стоит лишь по-настоящему продуманная стратегия захвата. Те, кто попал сюда, совершили ошибку и понесли наказание".

traits.locale_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."
"Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."
"Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

languages.text: 「苦しみは、本当に計画的に捕獲する戦略を持っている場合にのみ価値がある。ここにたどり着いたということは、どこかで間違いを犯したということだ。そしてこれがその罰である」
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: 「苦しみは、本当に計画的に捕獲する戦略を持っている場合にのみ価値がある。ここにたどり着いたということは、どこかで間違いを犯したということだ。そしてこれがその罰である。」

languages.text: « Pour que la souffrance en vaille la peine, il faut avoir une stratégie de capture solide. Si on se retrouve ici sans le vouloir, c'est que l'on a commis une erreur en cours de route et ça devient alors une punition. »
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: « Pour que la souffrance en vaille la peine, il faut avoir une stratégie de capture solide. Si on se retrouve ici sans le vouloir, c'est que l'on a commis une erreur en cours de route et ça devient alors une punition. »

languages.text: "Leid lohnt sich nur, wenn man eine wirklich gute Ausstiegsstrategie hat. Wer hier endet, hat irgendwo auf dem Weg einen Fehler gemacht, und das ist die Bestrafung."
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: "Leid lohnt sich nur, wenn man eine wirklich gute Ausstiegsstrategie hat. Wer hier endet, hat irgendwo auf dem Weg einen Fehler gemacht, und das ist die Bestrafung."

languages.text: "Acı çekmek ancak gerçekten iyi planlanmış bir yakalama stratejisine sahipseniz değerlidir. Eğer buraya düştüyseniz yol boyunca bir yerde hata yaptınız demektir. Bu da cezanızdır."
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: "Acı çekmek ancak gerçekten iyi planlanmış bir yakalama stratejisine sahipseniz değerlidir. Eğer buraya düştüyseniz yol boyunca bir yerde hata yaptınız demektir. Bu da cezanızdır."

languages.text: «El sufrimiento solo vale la pena cuando forma parte de una estrategia bien planificada para la captura. Si uno acaba aquí es porque ha cometido algún error por el camino, y este es su castigo».
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: «El sufrimiento solo vale la pena cuando forma parte de una estrategia bien planificada para la captura. Si uno acaba aquí es porque ha cometido algún error por el camino, y este es su castigo».

languages.text: “只有在你有天衣无缝的捕获策略之时，受苦才值得。既然你沦落到这儿，那肯定是哪个环节搞砸了，而这就是对你的惩罚。”
languages.original_text: "Suffering is only worthwhile if you have a truly well-planned capture strategy. If you've wound up here, you made a mistake somewhere along the way, and this is your punishment."

traits.locale_text: “只有在你有天衣无缝的捕获策略之时，受苦才值得。既然你沦落到这儿，那肯定是哪个环节搞砸了，而这就是对你的惩罚。”
